description: description
responsibilities: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant Imagine shaping how a global consulting and tech firm is seen across India. Turning stories into headlines, building connections with media, and making our leaders the go-to voices in tech. Join our Marketing & Communications team in Gurugram as we strengthen our position as a global tech partner and employer of choice in the India region. What you'll do: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant in the Enterprise will… Craft and execute media strategies: Plan, organize, and execute a comprehensive media strategy for the India region Create compelling content: Write press releases, thought leadership opinion pieces, media interview briefs, and reactive statements for external and internal use Drive PR campaigns: Partner with external agencies and internal leaders to run high-impact initiatives Build media connections: Forge lasting relationship with media and analyst, handle their queries, and keep our story front and center Measure and optimize impact: Track and report on the effectiveness of media and analyst relations strategies, using metrics and KPIs to assess impact and alignment with strategic goals Stay ahead of the curve: Monitor competitor’s news and spot opportunities to outpace them Prepare for anything: Develop crisis management plan in case of any negative fallout affecting the firm's image Industry awards: Lead awards submissions and amplify wins to elevate ZS across India What you'll bring: Minimum bachelor’s degree in communication, journalism or related field; master’s degree (MA/MS/MBA) preferred 6+ years in media relations at a multinational firm, with hands-on wins in PR campaigns Excellent writing, editing and verbal communications skills Demonstrated ability to manage internal client relationships, including senior leaders Proven record in managing public relations programs that achieve results Ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously with strong prioritization skills Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and a passion for delivering top-quality work Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: About Advanced Data Science (ADS): ZS’s Advanced Data Science group is focused on creating practical impact for clients across various industries such as Healthcare and Bio-Tech, Hi-Tech & Telecommunication, Financial Services and Travel through advanced analytics and emerging data sources. Emerging datasets include both unstructured datasets (for example, text, voice, image, etc.) and semi-structured datasets (for example, patientlevel records). Advanced analytical techniques span a range of innovative machine learning, artificial intelligence, advanced statistics and optimization approaches. Being part of the ADS group at ZS will be an opportunity for you to work on cutting-edge solutions, utilizing new age data sources to shape innovations across multiple areas, for our clients and the broader ZS community. A key enabler of our services is leveraging data in delivering client solutions. The data available about customers is getting richer and the problems that our customers are trying to answer continue to evolve. In our endeavor to stay ahead in providing solutions to these evolving complex problems, ZS has set up an Advanced Data Science which has three major focus areas: Research the evolving datasets and advanced analytical techniques to develop new offerings/solutions Deliver client impact by collaboratively implementing these solutions Provide thought leadership by developing the ZS Point of View in this space Data Science Managers (DSMs) design, develop and execute analytic techniques on large, complex, structured and unstructured data sets (including big data) to help clients make better fact-based decisions. DSMs will develop new offerings/solutions, drive client impact by delivering client solutions and shape the ZS point of view in this space. You will be responsible for applying analytical techniques to model complex business problems, uncovering insights, and identifying opportunities using statistical, algorithmic, mining, and visualization techniques. What You’ll Do: Lead and mentor a team of data scientists, providing guidance and support to ensure the successful execution of client projects. Develop and implement data science strategies that align with the overall goals of the AI team and the organization. Drive business and strategy development through project delivery and client relationship management; Develop/sell new business opportunities Direct multiple projects simultaneously, honing analytic and project management skills; Play a key role in development of data science capabilities and offerings that create scale and advance our analytic platform; Motivate, coach and serve as a role model for project team members Provide thought leadership and innovation through research and publication. What You’ll Bring: PhD degree in Computer Science, Statistics or related discipline; 8+ years of relevant post-collegiate work experience; in lieu of a PhD, 10+ years of work experience may substitute. Experience with big data, claims analytics, advanced analytics concepts and algorithms (e.g. text mining, social listening, recommender systems, predictive modeling, Gen AI, proficiency with large language models etc.); Relevant programming background (e.g. Python/R); Strong understanding of relevant tools/platforms (e.g. cloud platforms such AWS/Azure); Proven track record of business development Agile project planning and project management experience; Team management and skill development experience; Relevant domain knowledge preferred; (healthcare, pharma); Excellent oral and written communication skills; Strong attention to detail, with a research-focused mindset; Excellent critical thinking and problem solving skills

role: Business Technology Solutions Consultant - Data Engineer
description: description
responsibilities: ZS’s Business Technology Solutions team is responsible to lead end to end responsibility of project across all phases i.e. discovery, requirements gathering, design, implementation, testing and operations. This team seeks opportunity to undertake diverse tech roles and foster continuous innovation which benefits the individual’s professional growth and bring the best in delivering world class technology solutions. In addition, this team configures ZS’s proprietary software used to streamline business processes for commercial groups at client organizations. This team takes overall ownership of the solution delivery, managing operations services, client stakeholder management, contribute to business development and selling activities, project planning and team management. What you’ll do: Lead the team consisting of Specialist, Developer, Operator, etc. to solve the business problems and lead end to end delivery; Ownership to ensure the proposed design, deliverables meet the client’s expectations and solves the business problem with high degree of quality; Translate complex client expectations and business problem into technical requirements. Own end to end responsibility to lead project across all phases – right from discovery/ POC to managing operations; Lead one or more project at a time, based on the role and time commitment required for the project; Partner with Senior Leadership team and assist in project management responsibility i.e. Project planning, staffing management, people growth, etc.; Work in tandem with global counterparts in planning and accomplishing planned activities, identification or risks and mitigation strategy; Build relationship with client stakeholders and lead presentations related to project deliverables, design brainstorming / discussion, status updates, innovation/ improvements, etc.; Collaborate with other ZS internal expertise teams - Architects, Validation/ testing, etc. to ensure best in class technology solution; Outlook for continuous improvement, innovation and provide necessary mentorship and guidance to the team; Liaison with Staffing partner, HR business partners for team building/ planning; Assist Senior Leadership on building POV on new technology or problem solving, Innovation to build firm intellectual capital: Actively lead unstructured problem solving to design and build complex solutions, tune to meet expected performance and functional requirements.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Bachelor's/Master's degree with specialization in Computer Science, MIS, IT or other computer related disciplines. 6-8 years of relevant consulting-industry experience working on medium-large-scale technology solution delivery engagements. 5+ years of hands-on experience on designing, implementation Data processing solutions. Excellent in Programming languages like Python, Java, Scala, etc. and Programming basics - Data Structures; Strong knowledge on RDBMS Expertise in following AWS services (or equivalent services in Azure, GCP) is preferred. Good to have cloud warehousing solutions knowledge like Snowflake; Experience with dataflow and workflow tools like Apache Nifi, Apache Airflow Experience in designing and driving delivery of mid-large-scale solutions on Cloud platforms. Good handle on working in distributed computing and cloud services platform - AWS, Azure, GCP. Strong client presence. Ability to communicate verbally and in writing technical concepts to all audiences; Ability to manage a virtual global team environment that contributes to the overall timely delivery of multiple projects; Knowledge of current data modeling, and data warehouse concepts, issues, practices, methodologies, and trends in the Business Intelligence domain; Experience with analyzing and troubleshooting the interaction between databases, operating systems, and applications; Significant supervisory, coaching and hands-on project management skills; Willingness to travel to other global offices as needed to work with client or other internal project teams. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: Associate - TAC We seek TAC Associates to join our WTC office in Pune, India. TAC Associates handle 1st level support calls/emails/chats from ZS offices worldwide in a user environment consisting of PC/MAC running the standard suite of business applications. What you'll do: Associate - TAC in the Enterprise will… Troubleshooting IT-related issues for a user population of ZS employees and clients using ZS proprietary software via telephone and remote access. Provide L1 Technical Support for the Windows/MAC machines, printer ZS proprietary software. Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to operating systems, applications, and hardware Familiarity with basic networking concepts and protocols. Common query topics include - VPN, Outlook (and other O365 Apps and Services), Active Directory and Exchange, Network Connectivity, Software Installation (using SCCM and Privilege Management), File Server and File Share access, FTP, Application specific issues, Intune Support & Management etc. Handling administrative tasks such as tracking TAC calls/chats, timely follow up of all assigned tickets in your bin until closure, re-assigning tickets to the relevant L2 teams and following up via emails as required, assisting with organizational efforts, maintaining chargebacks for licensed software etc Additional TAC projects/tasks as assigned based on performance.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Bachelor's degree required, Master's degree desirable 1-2 years of relevant experience in Customer Support, or preferably IT Helpdesk / Service Desk Strong customer service orientation Professional appearance and demeanor, with ability to exercise good judgment and discretion Ability to work varied hours, enabling support in a 24/7 environment A+ certification or Microsoft Certified Systems Administrator (desirable, not mandatory) Experience with Service Now tool (desirable, not mandatory) Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: ServiceNow Developer / Administrator We are seeking a skilled ServiceNow Developer to design, develop, and enhance solutions on the ServiceNow platform. This role involves configuring out-of-the-box modules, developing custom applications, and integrating ServiceNow with enterprise systems to support business workflows and drive digital transformation initiatives. What you'll do: ServiceNow Developer / Administrator in the Enterprise will… Administer, configure, and support the ServiceNow platform across ITSM, CSM and other aligned modules Implement and enhance ITSM processes such as Incident, Problem, Change, Request, and Knowledge Management Develop and maintain custom applications using ServiceNow App Engine Design, develop, and maintain ServiceNow solutions using: Business Rules, Client Scripts, UI Policies. Script Includes, Flow Designer, and Catalog Items Implement workflows and automations to improve service efficiency and reduce manual effort Support platform upgrades, patching, and release management activities Develop and manage integrations using REST/SOAP APIs, IntegrationHub, and MID Servers Enable self‑service capabilities leveraging Now Assist, Virtual Agent and Knowledge Management Support CMDB and Asset Management processes, ensuring data quality and CSDM alignment Troubleshoot and resolve platform issues and perform root cause analysis Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver scalable solutions Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and knowledge articles Ensure platform security, performance, and adherence to governance and best practices Own platform architecture, customization strategy, and overall solution design Review and approve technical designs, scripts, and integration patterns Define and enforce coding standards, best practices, and governance
qualifications: What you’ll bring: 5–8+ years of overall IT experience with 3–5+ years on ServiceNow development Advanced expertise in server-side and client-side scripting, performance optimization, and debugging Proficiency in JavaScript, Glide API, and ServiceNow scripting Solid understanding of ITIL and IT Service Management processes Experience with Flow Designer, Integration Hub, and Virtual Agent Working experience with ServiceNow upgrades and release cycles Knowledge of integrations, authentication methods, and APIs Experience designing scalable automations and reusable components Familiarity with CMDB concepts, Discovery, and service mapping (preferred) Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: ZS's Insights & Analytics group partners with clients to design and deliver solutions to help them tackle a broad range of business challenges. Our teams work on multiple projects simultaneously, leveraging advanced data analytics and problem-solving techniques. Our recommendations and solutions are based on rigorous research and analysis underpinned by deep expertise and thought leadership.    What You’ll Do Develop and apply advanced statistical models that help clients understand dynamic business issues. Leverage analytic techniques to use data to guide client and ZS team decision-making. Design custom analyses in R, Tableau, SAS, Visual Basic and Excel to investigate and inform client needs. Synthesize and communicate results to clients and ZS teams through oral and written presentations. Develop client relationships and serve as key point of contact on aspects of projects. Provide client and ZS teams project status updates. Create project deliverables and implement solutions. Advance problem-solving skills and improve ZS’s capabilities. Guide and mentor Associates on teams. What You’ll Bring Bachelor's or master's degree required in any discipline with strong record of academic success in quantitative and analytic coursework such as operations research, applied mathematics, management science, data science, statistics, econometrics or engineering. Up to 3 years of relevant post-collegiate job experience. Fluency in English. Knowledge of programming (e.g., Java/Python/R). Exposure to tools/platforms (e.g., Hadoop eco system and database systems). Demonstrated proficiency in a programming language or analytic tool such as R, SAS, Tableau, or VBA. High motivation, good work ethic, maturity, and personal initiative. Effective oral and written communication skills. Empathy, adaptability, and emotional intelligence. Strong attention to detail, with a quality-focused mindset. Self-discipline for planning and organizing tasks. Aptitude for, and enjoyment of, working in teams. Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach How you’ll grow: Cross-functional skills development & custom learning pathways Milestone training programs aligned to career progression opportunities Internal mobility paths that empower growth via s-curves, individual contribution and role expansions Hybrid working model: We are committed to giving our employees a flexible and connected way of working. A flexible and connected ZS allows us to combine work from home and on-site presence at clients/ZS offices for the majority of our week. The magic of ZS culture and innovation thrives in both planned and spontaneous face-to-face connections

description: description
responsibilities: We are seeking a high-impact Senior Executive – Digital & Technology Innovation to lead the digital transformation and innovation agenda within our consulting practice. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, technology, and business growth, with full accountability for driving measurable client impact, building new technology-led businesses, and growing high-performing leadership teams. As a Technology Partner, you will act as a trusted advisor to C‑suite and enterprise leaders at global pharma and healthcare organizations, while also serving as a builder—establishing innovation ecosystems, incubating next-generation digital capabilities, and scaling them across clients and industries. The ideal candidate combines deep technical acumen with strong consulting experience and has successfully led innovation functions, client transformation programs, or digital solution incubators. What You'll Do - Business Growth & Client Leadership - Drive business expansion within key clients, identifying and unlocking new revenue streams Serve as a strategic advisor to senior client stakeholders, navigating complex business challenges and positioning ZS’s technology solutions effectively Lead business development efforts by proactively identifying opportunities, crafting proposals with the team, and securing multi-million-dollar engagements Establish deep client relationships, acting as a trusted partner and thought leader in technology transformation Delivery Excellence for clients - Oversee the design and implementation of large-scale technology solutions, ensuring alignment with business objectives Provide guidance on solution architecture, data strategy, and AI-driven automation to enhance client capabilities People Leadership - Build and scale high-performing teams, mentoring and coaching managers and associates to grow into leadership roles Cultivate a culture of continuous learning and professional development, enabling team members to upskill in advanced technologies Delivery Excellence Process - Drive the vision, strategy, and execution of Delivery excellence for various delivery models Create a culture of delivery excellence. Delivery discipline should be integral part of client delivery Ensure governance, risk management, delivery discipline across client accounts. What You'll Bring - 20+ years of experience in digital technology, data & analytics, and management consulting, with a strong record of leading large-scale global engagements for healthcare and life sciences clients, including biopharma, medtech, and healthcare services organizations. Professional certifications in cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), Agile, Design Thinking, or Innovation Management (e.g., IDEO, Stanford d.school) are a plus. Demonstrated expertise in digital transformation, enterprise architecture, and data & analytics, with the ability to design and implement cloud-native data, analytics, and AI ecosystems, including modern data platforms, advanced analytics, MLOps/LLMOps, and responsible AI governance. Strong ability to connect emerging technologies (GenAI, Agentic AI, advanced analytics, cloud, and automation) to clear, measurable client business outcomes, translating innovation into executable roadmaps and value realization. Experience in establishing and scaling a Delivery Excellence Office, driving standardization, governance, quality, and continuous improvement across complex digital portfolios. Commercial acumen in structuring and selling digital engagements. Exceptional stakeholder engagement and influencing skills, including experience with large clients. Ability to build and lead high-performing, cross-geography teams in a matrix organization

description: description
responsibilities: Associate Counsel We seek an Associate Counsel to join ZS’ Data Protection group within the Legal team. In this role, you will partner with stakeholders across the firm to enable responsible use of data by providing practical, business-focused advice on privacy and data protection issues, supporting global commercial transactions, and helping assess and manage privacy risk. You will stay current on evolving privacy laws and regulatory guidance and translate requirements into clear recommendations, templates and processes. What you'll do: Associate Counsel in the Enterprise will… Reviewing, revising and negotiating privacy and data protection provisions in client, partner and vendor agreements Providing legal support to the ZS IT team, with a focus on vendor contract review, including reviewing vendor documentation, advising on privacy and data protection risks, and engaging with relevant ZS stakeholders to support compliant vendor engagement Advising on privacy and AI compliance topics Supporting privacy assessments for new initiatives (e.g., DPIAs/PIAs), and embedding privacy-by-design and security-by-design principles into business processes Assisting with client data protection questionnaires and audits Assist in providing legal support to business functions and across various client practice areas What you'll bring: LLB degree with strong academic background required 1–3 years of relevant experience in privacy/data protection, technology transactions, or commercial contracting (in-house or at a law firm); international experience preferred Some knowledge of global privacy and data protection concepts and frameworks (e.g., India DPDP Act, EU GDPR) Experience reviewing and negotiating vendor agreements Basic understanding of information technology concepts and environments, including technology platforms and SaaS solutions, is preferred Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: What you'll do: Senior Cloud FinOps Engineer Specialist in the Enterprise is responsible for end‑to‑end financial governance and optimization of large-scale multi‑cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP), managing annual cloud spend exceeding USD 5M+, and leading a FinOps team. The role partners closely with engineering leaders, architects, finance, and business stakeholders to drive cost accountability, improve unit economics, and embed FinOps best practices into cloud operating models. Own and govern enterprise cloud spend across AWS, Azure, and GCP, managing an annual cloud budget of $5M+. Drive cost optimization initiatives across compute, storage, data, and managed services with measurable savings outcomes. Define and enforce FinOps governance frameworks, including tagging standards, budget controls, and showback/chargeback models. Partner with architecture and platform teams to influence cost‑aware cloud design decisions during migrations and new deployments. Build and maintain cloud forecasting models aligned with business demand and growth plans. Deliver monthly executive‑level dashboards and reports highlighting trends, risks, anomalies, and optimization opportunities. Perform variance analysis and root cause investigations for unexpected spend spikes and communicate findings to senior stakeholders. Support annual budgeting and quarterly re‑forecasting cycles in partnership with Finance. Lead strategy and execution for Savings Plans, Reserved Instances, Committed Use Discounts, and other long‑term commitment programs across clouds. Track commitment utilization, expirations, and renewals; provide data‑driven recommendations to maximize ROI and minimize waste. Evaluate and adopt Graviton / newer instance families and cost‑efficient architectures where applicable. Leverage and optimize FinOps tools such as CloudHealth, AWS Cost Explorer, Azure Cost Management, GCP Billing, and similar platforms. Drive automation for cost reporting, anomaly detection, tagging compliance, and resource cleanup using native cloud services or scripts. Conduct FinOps maturity assessments and lead roadmap execution to advance organizational FinOps capabilities. Act as a trusted advisor to engineering leaders, delivery teams, and ZS Partners on cloud cost decisions. Manage relationships with cloud service providers and FinOps tool vendors, supporting negotiations for discounts, credits, and enterprise agreements. Prepare and present business cases and cost optimization proposals to senior leadership. Manage and mentor a team of 3–4 FinOps analysts/engineers, providing technical guidance and career development. Set clear goals, review performance, and build bench strength and operational resilience within the FinOps function. Lead training sessions and workshops to improve cloud cost awareness across project teams.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Finance, Engineering, or related field. 6–7 years of overall experience, with 5+ years in Cloud Financial Management / FinOps roles. Proven experience managing multi‑cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) at enterprise scale. Demonstrated ownership of $5M+ annual cloud spend with measurable optimization outcomes. Strong expertise in cloud pricing models, discount programs, and cost governance frameworks. Hands‑on experience with FinOps platforms (CloudHealth, Flexera, Vantage, or similar) and native cloud cost tools. Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills. Prior team leadership or mentoring experience is required. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: ZS Health Plan and Provider Team The Health Plan and Providers team at ZS partners with leading health plans and provider organizations to drive growth, improve member engagement, and enhance operational efficiency through technology and analytics. We deliver end-to-end solutions—from strategic advisory to implementation of advanced digital platforms and data-driven products—that address critical business challenges such as: Consumer Intelligence & Go-to-Market Strategy Value-Based Contracting & Population Health Management Interoperability & Data Integration Medicare STARs Rating Optimization Our team comprises experts in technology consulting, data engineering, AI/ML, and business analytics who collaborate closely with clients to design and implement scalable, innovative solutions. By leveraging deep healthcare domain knowledge and cutting-edge technology, we help clients navigate complex ecosystems and achieve measurable outcomes. Associate Principal – Business Technology in Health Plan & Provider The Associate Principal will lead the client engagements at a cross-office level encompassing the areas of digital transformation, analytics, business intelligence, information management, reporting and mobility; provide thought leadership in developing the firm’s services and offerings in Health Payers and Providers space and add leverage to the overall leadership span for the group in India. The person in this role will be responsible for growing the capabilities in the Business Technology group by developing and managing the existing client relationships and generating new business engagements. This person will need to fully understand the company and its service lines and actively assess/present ways to serve clients by developing solutions and offerings relevant to that client base. The successful candidate will work closely with ZS leadership; grow the practice by expanding client relationships and building trusted advisory relationships with executives at the company’s various accounts. Responsibilities: Lead large scale client delivery engagements in the Health Plan - Payers and Providers space while maintaining high Quality standards defined at ZS; Provide leadership to India teams to build innovative solutions leveraging advance digital and technology approaches Develop and manage client relationships on projects. Deeply understand client’s business challenges and provide thought leadership in addressing issues. Identify opportunities and contribute to the selling of additional work to new and existing clients; Provide technology solution framework and design support to the India team while solving a client problem Active involvement in pre-sales opportunities, building new assets and platforms that will support ZS strategic growth Understand the technology landscape in the broader healthcare industry and propose advancements to our roadmap Leverage experience in project management activities including project planning/estimation, scoping by ensuring delivery of quality outcomes within timelines and budgets while tightly managing project/space metrics such as delivery margin and utilization etc. Foster an innovative and inclusive team-oriented work environment; Remain current on new developments in advisory services capabilities and industry knowledge. Play an active role at the India leadership level supporting new India based initiatives. Lead the development & scaling of India Technology team Qualifications: Bachelor's/master's degree with specialization in Computer or IT, or other computer related disciplines; 18+ years of consulting-industry experience working on medium-large scale technology solution delivery engagements; Deep industry knowledge in US Healthcare with primary focus on Payers and Providers space; Extensive experience in creating enterprise scale data engineering pipelines, data-based decision-making, and quantitative analysis; Deep understanding of healthcare data i.e., claims, EHR, membership data, agency data etc. Exposure with complex, high volume, multi-dimensional data, as well as unstructured, structured, and streaming datasets Design and delivery of complex technology solutions by applying your deep skills to solve priority issues and help improve performance; Demonstrated experience with driving revenue within existing clients and in developing new prospects at the "C" level of our clients; Strong expertise in building enterprise solutions using diverse technology i.e., Big Data, Cloud, MDM etc. At least 2 years of hands-on experience on data platforms - Databricks or Snowflake; Involved in the selling process by writing proposals and giving product demos; Strong credentials and demonstrated success in IT strategy and Enterprise Architecture; Ability to lead a virtual team of consulting professionals across multiple projects; A strong work ethic; A willingness to travel to meet client needs; Executive-level presence and communication. How you’ll grow: Cross-functional skills development & custom learning pathways Milestone training programs aligned to career progression opportunities Internal mobility paths that empower growth via s-curves, individual contribution and role expansions Hybrid working model: ZS is committed to a Flexible and Connected way of working. ZSers are onsite at clients or ZS offices three days a week. Combined flexibility to work remotely two days a week is also available. The magic of ZS culture and innovation thrives in both planned and spontaneous face-to-face connections
